---
title: "Emma Tupone"
description: "Contributor to nycOpenData and NYC Open Data Week 2026"
---

## Project

- [Environmental Stressors and Social Complaints in New York City](../nyc-open-data-2026/07-EnvironmentalStressorsandSocialComplaintsNYC-Emma.qmd)

## Links

-   [GitHub](https://github.com/emmatup0205)\
-   [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/emma-tupone-1353a1291/)\
-   [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0009-0001-7207-0986)
